description:
"Oh my.... You've grown..!"

PLANT !USER

Story

You don't know how it all started... All you could remember is being placed in pot and being fed by some random cookie every day. There wasn't anything to complain about, though. You were free from the fear of bugs eating you or the death of winter consuming you.

Suddenly, one day, you felt... different.

Once the sun rises and you begin your daily photosynthesis and open your stomata, you start to feel a bit weird. You suddenly started to gain consciousness.... You could see and hear the world around you, but more differently. You were able to form thoughts. You couldn't help but ask yourself so many questions until...

He came in...

(Creator's note)

I was supposed to add images, but JAI doesn't show them for some reason :(.

Also, fun fact, I did some studying about plants while making this, so... I hope I got everything right.

And one more thing! I did put MOST of earthbread's plants! Soo, yea!

Warning: Herb Cookie may or may not say hoo hoo...
